title: Fix Null Pointer Exception in String Concatenation

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: Given a string, add 'World' to the beginning of the string if it is not already empty.
statement.outputFormat: The updated string with 'World' prepended if the original string is not empty.

examples.explanation: Original string is not empty, append 'World'
Original string is empty, set to 'World'

hints.text: First hint text: Handle the edge case where the input string is null or empty.

editorial.title: Handling null/empty strings in string concatenation
editorial.intuition: Before concatenating strings, ensure the original string is not null or empty.
editorial.bruteForce: Concatenate 'World' directly without checking the original string.
editorial.betterSolution: Add a null check before concatenation.
editorial.optimalSolution: Prepend 'World' only if the original string is not empty.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: Test cases cover edge cases and normal scenarios.
editorial.dryRun: Step-by-step example run: Handle null/empty strings correctly.

buggyStarterCode.python: def solve(self, s: str) -> str: return s +"World";
